deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by $93K-$143K. Double-carrying (apartment + $2,843.85 mortgage). 208 DOM. Market value $350K-$400K vs payoff $493K. Three path options identified. Critical decision needed from sellers.

Outside agent showing property today. Lawn care referral: Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804.
Express Offers returned $550K value - likely inflated vs CMA.
CMA complete: realistic market value $350K-$400K, underwater by $93K-$143K
Seller finance buyer interest fading. Price reduction conversation critical.
